title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM integration for Ollama; plug local models into retrieval-augmented generation apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”); supports RAG, multimodal, and admin controls.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; generate, chat, and embed with local models in JVM applications.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/sync bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app example showing how to stream Ollama responses in a browser.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for chatting with Ollama models on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that enables Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated list of GGUF models tested with Ollama and ready-to-use Modelfile snippets.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama server and common models for reproducible deployments on NixOS.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Simple Slack bot using Bolt JS that answers channel mentions with Ollama-generated responses.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI template that streams Ollama responses and supports session memory.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Community Elixir package wrapping the Ollama REST API with GenServer and streaming support.
